violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. Raw beef patties were located above cut tomatoes and ready to eat deli meat.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Sanitizer bucket tested 0ppm at the time of inspection.

Reheating food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not reheated rapidly so all parts reached a temperature of 165F for 15 seconds within one hour. Reheating of soups in crock pots, temperature was 90 degrees at 1 hour of reheating.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Dish machine machine was not designed and/or constructed properly.--Sanitize solution for mechanical ware washing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. Dish machine was not testing for any concentration of sanitizing solution at the time of inspection.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Underneath the reach-in prep cooler needs to be cleaned.
